# TradiesMate

> TradiesMate is UK software for tradespeople. It rescues missed calls with a dedicated number and SMS qualification, drafts van-friendly quotes from your rates, sends accept links, chases payment, takes card deposits (Pay Now), and keeps diary and certificates in one place.

Website: https://tradiesmate.co.uk
Contact: info@tradiesmate.co.uk
Support (active customers): support@tradiesmate.co.uk

## Who it is for

Plumbers, electricians, heating engineers, roofers, decorators, locksmiths, and other UK trades who lose work when they cannot answer the phone on the tools.

## What it does

- Dedicated UK TradiesMate number with call divert for missed-call rescue
- SMS job qualification (or voicemail → job)
- Voice memo / notes → draft quote from your price book (GBP, VAT)
- Customer SMS links to accept or decline quotes
- Auto-reminders for quotes and invoices
- Bank-transfer invoices and optional Stripe card deposits (Pay Now)
- Job diary and trade certificates from the same job
- Sign-in with one-time SMS code (no password)

## Pricing

- Trial: £14 for 14 days
- Then: £49 every 30 days unless cancelled
- Cancel before day 14 to avoid the £49 charge

## Public pages

- Home: https://tradiesmate.co.uk/
- Start trial / signup: https://tradiesmate.co.uk/signup
- Sign in (tradies): https://tradiesmate.co.uk/t/auth

## Optional

- Sitemap: https://tradiesmate.co.uk/sitemap.xml
- Brand / product name: TradiesMate (not “Traders Mate”)
